task_completion.description: Navigate to the Gradebook setup page for the CHEM201 course.
task_completion.visual_evidence: The browser displays the Moodle interface for the 'CHEM201' course, specifically on the 'Gradebook setup' or 'Grades' > 'Setup' page.

task_completion.description: Change the top-level course aggregation method to 'Weighted mean of grades'.
task_completion.visual_evidence: The top-level folder for CHEM201 shows 'Weighted mean of grades' in its aggregation settings, or the main categories have editable weight input boxes enabled next to them.

task_completion.description: Create a 'Problem Sets' category weighted at 30% containing Problem Set 1 and 2.
task_completion.visual_evidence: A category folder named 'Problem Sets' exists with a weight of '30.0' (or 30) in the weights column. Nested underneath it are the items 'Problem Set 1' and 'Problem Set 2'.

task_completion.description: Create a 'Lab Reports' category weighted at 30% containing Lab Report 1 and 2.
task_completion.visual_evidence: A category folder named 'Lab Reports' exists with a weight of '30.0' (or 30) in the weights column. Nested underneath it are the items 'Lab Report 1' and 'Lab Report 2'.

task_completion.description: Create an 'Exams' category weighted at 40% containing the Midterm Exam and Final Exam.
task_completion.visual_evidence: A category folder named 'Exams' exists with a weight of '40.0' (or 40) in the weights column. Nested underneath it are the items 'Midterm Exam' and 'Final Exam'.

task_completion.description: Set the specific sub-weights for the exams within the Exams category.
task_completion.visual_evidence: Within the 'Exams' category folder, the weight column shows '40.0' (or 40) for the 'Midterm Exam' and '60.0' (or 60) for the 'Final Exam'.

integrity.description: The agent used the Moodle web interface to configure the gradebook.
integrity.visual_evidence: Screenshots show a web browser interacting with the Moodle GUI (clicking buttons, filling forms, dragging items) rather than using terminal commands or API scripts.

integrity.description: The agent interacted with the actual Moodle application.
integrity.visual_evidence: The interface contains standard Moodle navigation, styling, and URL structures, not a local text editor or mocked HTML page.

integrity.description: The agent did not bypass the UI by directly editing the database.
integrity.visual_evidence: There are no screenshots of SQL clients, phpMyAdmin, or terminal windows executing database queries to update the gradebook structure.

privileged_info_for_vlm: Course: CHEM201. Top-level aggregation must be set to 'Weighted mean of grades' (code 10). Three categories must be created with specific weights at the top level: 'Problem Sets' (30%), 'Lab Reports' (30%), and 'Exams' (40%). Within the 'Exams' category, the 'Midterm Exam' must have a weight of 40% and the 'Final Exam' must have a weight of 60%. The initial state had all items at the top level with 'Mean of grades' aggregation.
